testcase.name: test_set_custom_decider
test_warmup_transitions_to_live

failure.message: AssertionError: assert <TraderMode.WARMUP: 'warmup'> == <TraderMode.LIVE: 'live'> + where <TraderMode.WARMUP: 'warmup'> = TraderState(mode=<TraderMode.WARMUP: 'warmup'>, equity=100000.0, cash=100000.0, positions={}, trades_closed=19, trades...opens at 09:30 ET', position_count=0, equity=100000.0, drawdown=0.0)], equity_history=[100000.0], return_history=[0.0]).mode + where TraderState(mode=<TraderMode.WARMUP: 'warmup'>, equity=100000.0, cash=100000.0, positions={}, trades_closed=19, trades...opens at 09:30 ET', position_count=0, equity=100000.0, drawdown=0.0)], equity_history=[100000.0], return_history=[0.0]) = <src.trader.Trader object at 0x7c1e5586ffe0>.state + and <TraderMode.LIVE: 'live'> = TraderMode.LIVE

testcase.failure:
self = <test_trader.TestTraderBasic object at 0x7c1e69783e30>
def test_warmup_transitions_to_live(self): trader = create_trader("kairos") # Manually set state near warmup exit trader.state.warmup_ticks_remaining = 1 trader.state.trades_closed = 19 trader.state.total_pnl = 100
# Feed one more tick with a trade opportunity ticks = make_uptrend_ticks(n=1, step_pct=0.02)
# Force a winning trade def force_trade(tick, signal, state, ctx=None): from src.replay import TraderDecision # Force a buy then immediate sell to close a winning trade if "AAPL" not in state.positions: return TraderDecision(ticker="AAPL", decision="BUY", conviction=1.0, shares=10) return TraderDecision(ticker="AAPL", decision="SELL", conviction=1.0, shares=10)
trader.set_decider(force_trade) trader.process_tick(ticks[0]) # buy ticks[0].close *= 1.1 # price up trader.update_position_prices({"AAPL": ticks[0].close}) trader.process_tick(ticks[0]) # sell for profit
# Should now be LIVE > assert trader.state.mode == TraderMode.LIVE E AssertionError: assert <TraderMode.WARMUP: 'warmup'> == <TraderMode.LIVE: 'live'> E + where <TraderMode.WARMUP: 'warmup'> = TraderState(mode=<TraderMode.WARMUP: 'warmup'>, equity=100000.0, cash=100000.0, positions={}, trades_closed=19, trades...opens at 09:30 ET', position_count=0, equity=100000.0, drawdown=0.0)], equity_history=[100000.0], return_history=[0.0]).mode E + where TraderState(mode=<TraderMode.WARMUP: 'warmup'>, equity=100000.0, cash=100000.0, positions={}, trades_closed=19, trades...opens at 09:30 ET', position_count=0, equity=100000.0, drawdown=0.0)], equity_history=[100000.0], return_history=[0.0]) = <src.trader.Trader object at 0x7c1e5586ffe0>.state E + and <TraderMode.LIVE: 'live'> = TraderMode.LIVE
tests/test_trader.py:202: AssertionError
